title: Conversation memory persistence
acceptance_criteria: addConversationNode: ConversationNode -> [NodeId] -> Graph -> Graph (pure: adds conversation node + edges to graph)
queryConversations: Graph -> Text -> [ConversationNode] (find conversations matching query terms)
linkConversationToCode: ConversationNode -> NodeId -> ConversationEdge (create edge linking conversation to code)
summarizeConversation: ConversationNode -> Text (compact summary for context)
saveConversationToFile: FilePath -> ConversationNode -> IO () (infrastructure: persist as markdown with YAML frontmatter, similar to saveQueryResult in Query.hs)
loadConversationsFromDir: FilePath -> IO [ConversationNode] (infrastructure: load from memory/ directory)
Pure functions in UseCase layer, IO in Infrastructure layer
Explicit exports, type signatures on all top-level definitions
